exploration_notes: The bug fix involves three interconnected changes: (1) `guessDateFromText` in property.ts parses text strings into Date objects using first `parseISO` for ISO 8601 format, then `new Date()` for common text formats like 'Jun 9, 2022', '2023/12/3', '03/12/2023', returning undefined for unparseable strings. (2) `getDateValue` in csvFormat.ts uses `guessDateFromText` instead of direct ISO-only parsing to handle CSV-imported date strings. (3) `getDateFromVCardProperty` in property.ts uses `guessDateF
